objective: Western companies (HQ in North America/Europe/Oceania) that announced or opened a regional headquarters in Saudi Arabia or the UAE between 2026-06-08 and 2026-07-08

hard_criteria.text: Global HQ in North America, Europe, or Oceania.

Publicly announced opening (or receiving a license for) a regional headquarters in Saudi Arabia or the UAE, with the announcement dated between 2026-06-08 and 2026-07-08 — not merely an office, branch, or expansion talk.

soft_criteria.text: The announcement names a location, license (e.g. Saudi RHQ program), or headcount — vs a vague intent statement.

columns.desc: e.g. Saudi RHQ program license, DIFC, ADGM

segments.label: gulf_biz_press
segments.focus: Gulf business press in the window — Arabian Business, Gulf News, Zawya, Arab News business, The National — RHQ/regional HQ announcements.

segments.label: gov_programs
segments.focus: Saudi RHQ program / MISA license announcements and UAE free-zone (DIFC, ADGM, DMCC) new-member news in the window.

segments.label: wire_services
segments.focus: PR Newswire, Business Wire, GlobeNewswire releases in the window mentioning a Saudi or UAE regional headquarters.

segments.label: western_press
segments.focus: Western business press (Reuters, Bloomberg, FT) on companies establishing Gulf regional HQs in the window.

segments.label: linkedin_moves
segments.focus: LinkedIn company announcements and exec posts in the window about opening a KSA/UAE regional HQ.
